testcase.classname: Task Manager API POST /tasks - should create a new task

testcase.classname: Task Manager API POST /tasks - should fail without title
testcase.name: Task Manager API POST /tasks - should fail without title

testcase.classname: Task Manager API GET /tasks - should return all tasks
testcase.name: Task Manager API GET /tasks - should return all tasks

testcase.classname: Task Manager API GET /tasks/:id - should return single task
testcase.name: Task Manager API GET /tasks/:id - should return single task

testcase.classname: Task Manager API GET /tasks/:id - should return 404 for non-existent task
testcase.name: Task Manager API GET /tasks/:id - should return 404 for non-existent task

testcase.classname: Task Manager API DELETE /tasks/:id - should delete a task
testcase.name: Task Manager API DELETE /tasks/:id - should delete a task

testcase.classname: Task Manager API DELETE /tasks/:id - should return 404 for already deleted task
testcase.name: Task Manager API DELETE /tasks/:id - should return 404 for already deleted task

testcase.classname: Task Manager API GET /health - should return UP status
testcase.name: Task Manager API GET /health - should return UP status

testcase.classname: Task Manager API GET /metrics - should return Prometheus metrics
testcase.name: Task Manager API GET /metrics - should return Prometheus metrics

testcase.classname: Task Manager API POST /tasks - should handle empty description
testcase.name: Task Manager API POST /tasks - should handle empty description

testcase.classname: Task Manager API GET /tasks - should list multiple tasks
testcase.name: Task Manager API GET /tasks - should list multiple tasks

testcase.classname: Task Manager API GET /health - should be JSON
